events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被要求基于场景返回JSON。场景是：在装配与制造中，扭矩与螺纹紧固的领域。观察到的现场条件是：扭矩-屈服螺栓被重复使用（TRD/CC - 一次性使用）。工作处于rough-complete阶段。参考材料：OEM/工程规范。

我们需要识别组件或条件，并指出可见的缺陷线索。显然，一次性的扭矩-屈服螺栓被重复使用，这违反了规范。决策应为fail，风险可能是high或critical，因为扭矩-屈服螺栓重复使用可能导致连接失效，风险高。工作阶段是rough-complete。组件状况：installed-defective（已安装但有缺陷）肯定适用，还有non-compliant。percent_complete可以给一个数值，如80%？但未明确，也许75%？value、sound_source等可能为0或空。findings应说明螺栓重复使用。actions：更换螺栓。rationale：扭矩-屈服螺栓设计为一次使用，重复使用会导致夹紧力不足。references：OEM规范或标准如ISO/ASME。confidence高。

因此构建JSON。注意：回答只包含JSON对象。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 75,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Torque-to-yield bolts reused, violating one-time use specification",
    "Reused bolts may not achieve designed clamp load, risking joint loosening or failure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove all reused torque-to-yield bolts",
    "Replace with new, OEM-specified torque-to-yield bolts following proper torque and angle procedure"
  ],
  "rationale": "Torque-to-yield fasteners are engineered to be tightened into the plastic deformation region and should never be reused because their ability to maintain consistent clamp load is compromised after yielding. Reuse can lead to under-torque, fastener relaxation, and eventual joint failure, posing safety risks.",
  "references": [
    "OEM service manual for the specific assembly",
    "ASME B107.300 torque and fastening standards",
    "Bolt manufacturer's installation guide (one-time use warning)"
  ]
}
